resources.string: Sign in with your own Twitch account to get started.
Use your own streamer account — you can add a bot account later from the dashboard.
Sign in with your Twitch account
Open Twitch and enter this code at twitch.tv/activate:
The code expired before you approved it. Try again.
The login was declined on Twitch.
By continuing you agree to the terms of service and privacy policy.
Sign in with your Twitch account to get started.
Link Spotify to enable song requests.
Link Discord for notifications and server sync.
Link YouTube to enable the YouTube music provider.
NomNomzBot runs your commands, timers, moderation, alerts, music, and more — one dashboard for your whole stream.
Enter your app credentials below — no config files needed. Finish each required step, then continue to sign in with Twitch.
Here's what you set up. Finish to sign in with your Twitch account.
Finish your required steps to continue.
Twitch sign-in failed. Please try again.
The bot talks to Twitch through your own Twitch app. Create one and paste its credentials.
Open the Twitch Developer Console at https://dev.twitch.tv/console/apps and register a new application.
Set the OAuth Redirect URL to exactly the address shown below.
Choose the "Chat Bot" category, create it, then copy the Client ID and generate a Client Secret.
Sign in as the Twitch account the bot posts chat from, and approve its chat permissions.
Log into Twitch as the bot's own account in this browser first.
Start the authorization, then approve the requested chat scopes.
Connect a Spotify app to enable song requests.
Add the Redirect URI shown below.
Copy the Client ID and Client Secret.
Connect a Discord app for notifications and guild sync.
Add the OAuth2 Redirect shown below.
Copy the Client ID and Client Secret from the OAuth2 page.
Connect a Google app to enable the YouTube music provider.
Add the Authorized redirect URI shown below.
Copy the Client ID and Client Secret.
From your Twitch app's settings page.
Generated on the Twitch app page — shown only once.
This workspace is being built — its tools land in an upcoming slice.
Your Twitch connection has expired, so the bot cannot read or send chat right now. Reconnect to restore chat, alerts, and commands — it only takes a moment, and you stay signed in.
Reconnect Twitch: go to %1$s and enter code %2$s
You're signed in as a viewer

This account has no management role on this channel, so there's no dashboard to show. You can still take part from chat and the channel's public pages. If you should have access, ask the streamer to add you.
No events yet — activity appears here when your channel is live.
Moment marked — it\'s bookmarked in your VOD.
Viewers vote by typing an option number in chat — works on every platform.
The live ban list isn\'t available here. Re-grant the moderation permissions, or check the bot is installed on this channel.
Shield Mode isn\'t available here. Re-grant the moderation permissions, or check the bot is installed on this channel.
Blocked terms aren\'t available here. Re-grant the moderation permissions, or check the bot is installed on this channel.
Delete the rule %1$s? This cannot be undone.
This bot\'s own record — not the viewer\'s full Twitch history.
Restricting holds all of this viewer’s messages for a moderator to review until you clear it. Continue?
No daily data for this period
No viewer data for this period
Could not load the song queue: %1$s
Refine your search to narrow %1$d matches
Give one viewer their own voice — their messages are always read in it, overriding the channel default. Enter their Twitch user ID and look them up.
This viewer uses the channel default voice.
Leave blank for no bits requirement.
Let viewers pick their own voice (!voice)
Run Azure or ElevenLabs voices on your own account by storing your provider key. Keys are encrypted and never shown again. Set the dispatch mode to BYOK and pick a default provider to use them.
Teach TTS how to say things: whenever a phrase appears in a message or username, the replacement is spoken instead.
Could not save that pronunciation rule: %1$s
Delete the rule for “%1$s”? TTS will speak it as written again.
Code is authored in the Code Scripts editor; this command keeps its script.
Sends a single time, then disables itself instead of looping.
Delete the timer "%1$s"? This cannot be undone.
Unban %1$s? They'll be able to chat in your channel again.
Delete this note? This can't be undone.
Deny %1$s’s appeal? Their ban stays in place.
Lift %1$s’s ban in every channel you moderate? This acts as your own account, best-effort.
Created outside the bot — use Take control to manage it.
Instant bet games (like !coinflip). These are commands you tune here.
Live rounds you start; viewers join by typing a keyword in chat.
Remove %1$s from the queue? It won't be played.
The old link will stop working immediately. Anyone with the old link will need the new one.
Remove “%1$s” from this viewer's custom data?
Ban %1$s? They won't be able to chat until you lift it.
Lift the ban on %1$s? They'll be able to chat again.
Connect your bot account and the services you stream with.
The account your bot chats from.
YouTube music provider and stream stats.
Cross-post alerts and notifications to your server.
Read, send and moderate your Kick chat alongside Twitch.
NomNomzBot needs %1$s on your own Twitch account — the one you stream on, not the bot account — to %2$s. One click re-authorizes your account and keeps every permission you already granted.

NomNomzBot needs %1$d more permission(s) on your own Twitch account — the one you stream on, not the bot account — to power some features. One click re-authorizes your account and keeps every permission you already granted.
Open Twitch and enter this code at twitch.tv/activate:
Waiting for you to approve on Twitch…
Authorize the bot account on Twitch
Sign in as the bot account, then enter this code at twitch.tv/activate:
Waiting for you to approve on Twitch…
Topics this channel is subscribed to on Twitch
Could not load your stream info: %1$s
Remove the bot from your chat (channel record stays)
The bot will leave your chat. It will stop sending and reading messages. You can rejoin it at any time.
Reset all bot settings to defaults
This clears all your bot configuration (TTS, automod, blocked terms, shield mode, etc.) back to defaults. Commands, pipelines, and timers are NOT removed.
Permanently remove this channel and all its data. You will need to re-run onboarding.
This permanently deletes all channel data — commands, pipelines, timers, economy, events, and every stored setting. This cannot be undone. You will be returned to the setup wizard.
Connect your own Twitch bot account so messages appear from your identity
The bot will fall back to the shared NomNomzBot identity for chat messages.
Turning the economy off stops viewers from earning. You can turn it back on later.
Delete the alert for %1$s? This can't be undone.
OBS browser-source overlays for your stream.
Delete %1$s? Its browser-source URL will stop working.
Leave blank for the system default.
#RRGGBB hex, or blank to use the theme background.
The overlay will serve version %1$s again.
Export your channel's full event ledger as a file you can back up or move to another deployment, or import a ledger you exported before. Importing only adds events that aren't already there.
This adds the file's events to your channel's ledger. Events already present are skipped, so it can't make duplicates, but it can't be undone. Continue?
This replays the entire event ledger to rebuild all read models from scratch. The channel's data will be temporarily incomplete while it runs. This cannot be undone. Continue?
Connect trusted peer bots and opt in to shared capabilities across deployments.
Revoke trust for peer "%1$s"? This will stop all federated communication with this peer.
From and to must be different accounts.
Refund "%1$s" and credit the buyer back?
Versioned Lua scripts attached to commands and pipeline actions.
No code scripts yet. Create one to get started.
Run this script with sample inputs. Effects are captured, never performed.
The bot talks to Twitch through a Twitch app. Use the shared app or paste your own credentials.
Create a Twitch app and paste its credentials, or keep using the shared app.
Open the Twitch Developer Console at https://dev.twitch.tv/console/apps and register a new application.
Set the OAuth Redirect URL to exactly the address shown below.
Choose the "Chat Bot" category, create it, then copy the Client ID and generate a Client Secret.
Generated on the Twitch app page — shown only once.
Leave blank to keep the current secret.
Saving new credentials replaces the current ones. The bot may need to re-authenticate.
%1$s needs its own app credentials before you can connect. Create an app on the %1$s developer console and paste its Client ID and Secret.
Pick channels to watch — their chats merge into one feed below, each line tagged by channel.
No channels you own or moderate.
Pick one or more channels above to start watching.
No messages yet — waiting for chat on the watched channels.
No chat yet. Messages appear here as they arrive.
Flag this chatter for a moderator to review. This doesn't punish them — a moderator decides what happens next.
Delete this message from %1$s? This can't be undone.
Time out %1$s? They won't be able to chat for a while.
No quotes yet. Add the first one.
Delete quote #%1$d? This can't be undone.
No random responses yet. Add the first one.

A named bag of lines the bot picks from at random. Drop {list.pick.<name>} into any command, response, or timer — e.g. a !fight command that names a different attack each time. Hit Test to see a sample draw.
Delete the random-response list '%1$s'? This can't be undone.
The list is empty — add a response first.
No chat triggers yet. Add the first one.
React to ordinary chat lines: when someone's message matches a pattern, the bot replies or runs a pipeline — e.g. "good bot" → "thank you!".
Delete the trigger for '%1$s'? This can't be undone.
Run a pipeline instead of a text reply
No giveaways yet. Create the first one.
Run a giveaway: open it, viewers enter with the keyword, then draw the winners.
Only draft or closed giveaways can be edited
Delete the giveaway '%1$s'? This can't be undone.
Stop accepting entries for '%1$s'? You can still draw winners afterwards.
Draw winners for '%1$s' now? Prizes are handed out immediately.
Viewers type this in chat while the giveaway is open.
Pay the summed entry costs instead
No code pools yet — create one in the section below.
No winners yet. Draw the giveaway to pick winners.
Replace %1$s with a fresh draw? Their spot is forfeited.
Whisper failed — reveal the code below.
Codes are encrypted and never shown here — only a winner's code can be revealed, once.
No code pools yet. Add one to give out codes as prizes.
Code pools are managed by the broadcaster.
Delete the code pool '%1$s'? This can't be undone.
No codes yet. Paste some below.
Connect a monetization provider to turn tips, memberships and merch into events you can respond to.
Enable a provider to record its supporter events. Only the broadcaster can connect a money source.
Tips, memberships and shop orders, received by webhook.
Paste your Ko-fi verification token below and connect — we\'ll give you the webhook URL to paste back into Ko-fi.
Webhook URL — paste this into the provider\'s settings
Disconnect %1$s? The bot stops recording its supporter events until you reconnect.
No supporter events yet. They appear here once a connected provider sends one.
No supporter events match this filter.
Connect a Discord server from the Integrations page to post notifications.
Delete the %1$s notification rule? This can't be undone.
The bot will stop posting to this server until consent is re-approved.
Opted-in members also get the go-live notification as a Discord DM. Members opt in via the button and can block DMs server-side.
Master switch — nothing posts to Discord until this is on.
No managed members or permits yet.
Set the minimum role that can use this action.
Remove %1$s's management role? They'll lose this access.
Revoke %1$s's permit? They'll lose this access.
The current share link will stop working immediately.
No pipelines yet. Create the first one.
No steps yet. Add the first one.
Operator (eq, ne, gt, lt, gte, lte)
Search for a song to request…
Your account is frozen — spending is paused.
No games are available right now.
Pronouns are shown from your Twitch profile and can't be edited here yet.
Your activity is included in channel analytics.
Your activity is excluded from channel analytics.
Enable or disable optional bot capabilities for your channel.
No feature flags found for this channel.
Receive events from external services or push notifications to your own endpoints.
The webhook payload reaches the pipeline or event as payload.* variables, plus webhook.provider and webhook.event_type.
No automation set — bind a pipeline or event
Copy this secret now — it will not be shown again.
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"? This cannot be undone.
Re-enable "%1$s"? The endpoint will start receiving deliveries again.
Send %1$s a copy of their stored data by email.
Permanently delete all stored data for %1$s. This cannot be undone.
Bind a pipeline to chain sound, overlay and chat on this event.
All limits are unlimited on self-hosted installs.
Hosted billing isn\'t configured on this server yet. Plans become purchasable the moment the operator finishes Stripe setup — nothing else changes here.
Your subscription stays active until the end of the current billing period.
Copy this key now — it is shown only once and can never be retrieved again.
Promote an existing user to a platform principal with the selected role.
Create a service account. Its key is returned exactly once.
Deactivate this principal? Their platform access is removed until reactivated.
A suspended tenant\'s dashboard and API go dark. A reason is required.
Restore the tenant to active. A justification is required.
No sound clips yet. Upload one to use it in pipelines.
No assets yet. Upload images or audio to use them in overlays and widgets.
Delete "%1$s"? Overlays and widgets using it will break. This can't be undone.
Connect external data feeds (heart rate, sensors, APIs) to pipeline triggers and template variables.
No custom data sources configured. Use a preset below or create one manually.
Auth token (leave blank to keep existing)
"%1$s" will be permanently removed. Any pipelines using its trigger will stop firing.
Test event fired — check your pipeline logs.

A data source lets the bot ingest an external feed — a heart-rate monitor, a sensor board, a companion app, or any JSON/websocket API. Each value that arrives fires a pipeline trigger and becomes a template variable you can use anywhere.
Poll a JSON feed named "heartrate" → reference {{custom.heartrate.bpm}} in a command or overlay, or trigger custom.heartrate in a pipeline.
Search by name to jump to its editor…
The voice the built-in commands answer in — it applies everywhere. You can still override any single command.
Clear, helpful, polite. The default voice.
Automatic reactions to chat activity. Set the actual greeting on the Event Responses page.
Greet a viewer the first time they ever chat.
Acknowledge a regular returning after time away.
Fire at the milestone stream counts below.
Minimum gap before greeting the same viewer again.
Enter a whole number of seconds (0 or more).
Muted: the bot ignores them (no commands, triggers, votes, giveaways, earning). Shadowbanned: also hidden from overlays. Blacklisted: their chat is dropped entirely.
Repeat-offender policy — each offense within the window climbs the ladder.
Heat score (0–100) that triggers an automatic timeout.
Ban %1$s across every channel where you are Lead Moderator or above. Reversible only by reverting the nuke batch.
Lift the ban on %1$s across %2$d channels?
Bans from a trusted partner during a shared-chat session also apply in your channel.
Offer your bans to trusted partners during a shared-chat session.
Connect OBS, control scenes, and manage the browser-source bridge.
How the bot reaches your OBS — a direct WebSocket or a browser-source bridge.
A password is stored. Leave blank to keep it.
Add this URL to OBS as a browser source to relay control without opening a port.
Bridge offline — no browser source connected
Switch scenes and control streaming or recording.
OBS is not reachable right now.
Connect VTube Studio and control your model, hotkeys, and expressions.
How the bot reaches VTube Studio's API.
No plugin token yet — authorize below.
Click Authorize, then approve the popup in VTube Studio. This can take up to a minute.
Waiting for approval in VTube Studio…
Authorized — a plugin token was granted.
Authorization failed or timed out. Is VTube Studio running with the API enabled?
Load a model, trigger a hotkey, or activate an expression.
Authorize the plugin to load the model, hotkey, and expression list.
Issue API tokens for external tools and pair devices like a Stream Deck.
No tokens yet. Create one to let an external tool authenticate.
Rotating \"%1$s\" invalidates the current secret immediately. Any tool using it stops working until you paste the new secret.
Revoking \"%1$s\" disables it permanently. This can't be undone.
Leave empty to allow any pipeline the invoke scope can run.
This is the only time the secret is shown. Copy it now — it can't be retrieved again.
Enter this code on the device to pair it. The device then appears in the token list.
Propose a GitHub-hosted widget for review. It enters the review queue, not the live catalogue.
Submitted for review. A reviewer will verify it before it appears in the gallery.
Re-pinning moves the item back to In review and off the public list.
Export, review, or erase the personal data this bot holds about you.
Download a machine-readable copy of everything this bot stores about you.
Opt out of analytics and marketing, or permanently erase all of your data.
Opt out of analytics and marketing?
Your account stays active — we just stop using your data for analytics and marketing.
This is irreversible. Your data is crypto-shredded and cannot be recovered.
You have no data requests yet.
Review and moderate viewer-submitted clips before they play on stream.
Reject "%1$s"? It will be removed from the queue.
Skip "%1$s"? It will not be played.
Viewers submit clips with the !media <url> chat command or a channel-point redeem — not from this page.
Package your channel's content into portable bundles, or install one.
A command's linked pipeline is included automatically.
This channel has no content to export yet.
Custom-code content is imported disabled, and any secrets must be re-entered after import.
This removes exactly what "%1$s" created on this channel.
The hosted marketplace isn't available yet.
A publisher token lets you submit bundles to the marketplace.
The ZIP is inspected locally before it's submitted.
